tools.description: Run bounded red, green, or check verification commands in a workspace-scoped terminal and persist task attempt state across server restarts.
tools.output_contract: MCP content array with optional structuredContent; runtime errors use VNEM structured error schema

rollback_behavior.guidance: Return backup, compensating action, or explicit rollback-unavailable state in evidence.

tools.name: vnem_tools_terminal_session
tools.title: Bounded Terminal Session
tools.description: Run one allowlisted build, test, check, or repository-inspection command in a stateful workspace-bounded session with captured output and explicit timeout evidence.
tools.output_contract: MCP content array with optional structuredContent; runtime errors use VNEM structured error schema

rollback_behavior.guidance: Return backup, compensating action, or explicit rollback-unavailable state in evidence.

tools.name: vnem_tools_official_documentation_fetch
tools.title: Official Documentation Fetch
tools.description: Fetch bounded HTTPS documentation from VNEM's known official source registry or a user-supplied URL and record compact task-scoped read-before-write context.
tools.output_contract: MCP content array with optional structuredContent; runtime errors use VNEM structured error schema
tools.credential_behavior: credential references only; values never returned

tools.name: vnem_tools_documentation_context
tools.title: Task Documentation Context
tools.description: Read compact documentation context previously fetched for one worker and task without another network call.
tools.output_contract: MCP content array with optional structuredContent; runtime errors use VNEM structured error schema

tools.name: vnem_tools_ephemeral_script
tools.title: Ephemeral Local Script
tools.description: Run a bounded one-off Node or Python helper in a temporary local sandbox, block process/network/dangerous APIs, capture evidence, and verify cleanup.
tools.output_contract: MCP content array with optional structuredContent; runtime errors use VNEM structured error schema

rollback_behavior.guidance: Return backup, compensating action, or explicit rollback-unavailable state in evidence.

tools.name: vnem_tools_code_index_status
tools.title: Code Index Status
tools.description: Report whether the structural index has been initialized, its size, dirty state, watcher state, pending incremental paths, and last redacted error without triggering a build.
tools.output_contract: MCP content array with optional structuredContent; runtime errors use VNEM structured error schema

tools.name: vnem_tools_registry_status
tools.title: VNEM Tools Registry Status
tools.description: Return the authoritative runtime tool registry, contract validation, categories, side-effect classes, compatibility metadata, and behavior-test reference gaps.
tools.output_contract: MCP content array with optional structuredContent; runtime errors use VNEM structured error schema

tools.name: mcp_semantic_code_search
tools.title: Semantic Code Search
tools.description: Compatibility name for the shared VNEM Tools structural code search implementation. Uses a lazy local private index and does not call external embedding APIs.
tools.output_contract: MCP content array with optional structuredContent; runtime errors use VNEM structured error schema

deprecation_state.migration_guidance: Use vnem_tools_structural_code_search on VNEM Tools MCP.

tools.name: mcp_apply_diff_patch
tools.title: Apply Exact Diff Patch
tools.description: Compatibility name for shared VNEM Tools exact and unified-diff patching with preconditions, atomic writes, evidence, and rollback.
tools.output_contract: MCP content array with optional structuredContent; runtime errors use VNEM structured error schema

rollback_behavior.guidance: Return backup, compensating action, or explicit rollback-unavailable state in evidence.

deprecation_state.migration_guidance: Use vnem_tools_exact_patch, vnem_tools_unified_diff_apply, or vnem_tools_patch_transaction on VNEM Tools MCP.

tools.name: mcp_fetch_documentation
tools.title: Fetch Current Documentation
tools.description: Compatibility name for shared VNEM Tools official documentation retrieval and task-scoped context recording.

tools.credential_behavior: credential references only; values never returned

deprecation_state.migration_guidance: Use vnem_tools_official_documentation_fetch and vnem_tools_documentation_context on VNEM Tools MCP.
